productDisplayName: Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Poppy Red Lip Liner
description: SHADE NAMEPoppy RedWHAT IT IS?This colour intense lip liner ensures perfect definition to your lips.WHAT IT DOES?It’s long lasting by nature, glides on smoothly and the ease of application makes for lush and distinctive lipsThe lip liner smoothly lines onto your lips giving them a super soft texture and defined edgesThe lip liner, lines your lip color giving you a long-lasting, silky feel and keeps them water, smudge and transfer proofFEATURESLines your lips smoothly for a soft finish and defined edges.Long lasting, water, smudge and transfer proof.Get a semi-matte finishSoft, creamy and easyTransfer proofSoft, creamy and easyIntense lined lipsABOUT THE COLLECTIONSuper soft, super smooth lips lined with a rich color finish are in. Color your lips in intense shades of Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Lip Liner, even lines and smooth semi-matte lips. Say goodbye to colour bleeds now that there’s Lakme Absolute Forever Silk Lip Liner… For lips that spell perfection.ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products. Lakme has a vast product range specially crafted by experts for the Indian skin. The brand has also been redefining fashion in India with Lakme Fashion Week, India's premier fashion event.
